Art. 21 of NIS2 requires Member States to ensure that essential entities take appropriate technical and organisational measures to manage risks posed to the security of network and information systems. These measures shall be based on an all-hazards approach.

The measures referred to shall include at least the following: (a) policies on risk analysis and information system security; (b) incident handling procedures; (c) business continuity measures, including backup management and disaster recovery. Competent authorities may issue guidelines on the measures in accordance with Art. 21 paragraph 2.
